targets.query:
from(bucket: "scada_data")
  |> range(start: -15m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ied_measurements")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "voltage_kv")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 10s, fn: mean)

from(bucket: "scada_data")
  |> range(start: -15m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ied_measurements")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "current_a")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 10s, fn: mean)

from(bucket: "scada_data")
  |> range(start: -15m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ied_measurements")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "freq_hz")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 10s, fn: mean)

from(bucket: "scada_data")
  |> range(start: -15m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ied_measurements")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "temp_oil_c")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 10s, fn: mean)

from(bucket: "scada_data")
  |> range(start: -15m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ied_measurements")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "active_power_mw")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 10s, fn: mean)

from(bucket: "scada_data")
  |> range(start: -15m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ied_measurements")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "mc_closed")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 10s, fn: last)
